# Remove voter: r1 has 4 voters on s1-s4, config says 3 replicas. s4 is dead,
# making it the obvious candidate for removal. 11 stores total to make the
# choice unambiguous.

set-store quiet=true
  store-id=1 node-id=1 locality-tiers=zone=a
  store-id=2 node-id=2 locality-tiers=zone=b
  store-id=3 node-id=3 locality-tiers=zone=c
  store-id=4 node-id=4 locality-tiers=zone=d
  store-id=5 node-id=5 locality-tiers=zone=e
  store-id=6 node-id=6 locality-tiers=zone=f
  store-id=7 node-id=7 locality-tiers=zone=g
  store-id=8 node-id=8 locality-tiers=zone=h
  store-id=9 node-id=9 locality-tiers=zone=i
  store-id=10 node-id=10 locality-tiers=zone=j
  store-id=11 node-id=11 locality-tiers=zone=k
----

store-leaseholder-msg
store-id=1
  range-id=1
    store-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    store-id=2 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=4 type=VOTER_FULL
    config=num_replicas=3
----

update-store-status store-id=4 health=dead leases=shedding replicas=shedding
----
dead shedding=leases,replicas

repair-needed
----
RemoveVoter: r1

repair store-id=1
----
[mmaid=1] repair action RemoveVoter for r1 not yet implemented
pending(0)
